offer: For insurance claims managers processing 10–20 claims/month, delayed reimbursements cause cash flow gaps. We monitor payment statuses and flag delays instead of manual tracking of claims statuses via spreadsheets.
problem: Delayed reimbursements causing cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance claims managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 insurance claims managers with demo
Share insights in community forums for claims managers
try_it: Let users try real-time status updates on 1-3 claims
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showcasing the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy reuse
Allow CSV import for existing claims data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
